sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ الطِّفْلُ مُصْطَفَى إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَرَأَى النُّجُومَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete Mustafa je pogledalo u nebo i vidjelo zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: The child Mustafa looked at the sky and saw the stars.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ أَبَاهُ مَا هِيَ النُّجُومُ وَكَيْفَ تَضِيءُ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je oca šta su zvijezde i kako sjaje.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his father what the stars are and how they shine.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الأَبُ مَعَهُ وَشَرَحَ لَهُ عَنِ الْكَوْنِ وَالنُّجُومِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je sjeo s njim i objasnio mu o svemiru i zvijezdama.
sentences.translationEn: The father sat with him and explained about the universe and stars.

sentences.arabic: نَامَ مُصْطَفَى بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ وَهُوَ يَحْلُمُ بِالنُّجُومِ.
sentences.translation: Mustafa je poslije toga zaspao sanjarući o zvijezdama.
sentences.translationEn: Mustafa fell asleep afterward dreaming about the stars.
